svg.aria-label: Spinifex message-driven architecture: standard AWS clients call the AWS Gateway over HTTPS with SigV4, which publishes to a NATS bus; stateless ec2/ebs/s3/vpc/iam daemons answer and drive local backends (QEMU/KVM, Viperblock, Predastore, OVN/OVS, identity store).
svg.text: AWS SDK → Gateway → NATS → service daemons
Standard AWS tooling, unmodified. No shims, no custom SDK.
spinifex/services/awsgw · TLS termination · SigV4 verification · IAM policy eval · NATS routing
BACKEND RESOURCES · local hardware · no cloud dependency

text.tspan: (no queue group) dispatches describe calls to every node.
: scale horizontally by starting more. No etcd, no Kubernetes, no external control plane. Systemd units, a NATS cluster, and your hardware.
